item.TDLINE: Sub: Issuance of Central Sales Tax Declaration Forms ('&P_TAXK1&' Form)
In order to comply with the conditions imposed by the Central Government
vide Notification No.GSR588 (E) Date 16.09.2005, Central Sales Tax
Declaration Forms are to be issued compulsorily on quarterly basis.
As directed by our Assessing Authority, we have to produce our balance
CSTD Forms for the quarter ending &LAST_QRTR_END_DT&. So, Please issue
us your all due CSTD Forms for the quarter ending &LAST_QRTR_END_DT&
against our following invoices without anymore delay.
Sub: Issuance of Central Sales Tax Declaration Forms ('&P_TAXK1&' Form)
In order to comply with the conditions imposed by the Central Government
vide Notification No.GSR588 (E) Date 16.09.2005, Central Sales Tax
Declaration Forms are to be issued compulsorily on quarterly basis.
As directed by our Assessing Authority, we have to produce our balance
CSTD Forms for the quarter ending &LAST_QRTR_END_DT&. So, Please issue
us your all due CSTD Forms for the quarter ending &LAST_QRTR_END_DT&
against our following invoices without anymore delay.
In view of the above, we believe that you will co-operate us by issuing
your all the due Central Sales Tax. Declaration Forms instantly covering
our aforesaid supplies for the quarter ending &LAST_QRTR_END_DT& only
and enable us to furnish the same before our sales tax authority in
In view of the above, we believe that you will co-operate us by issuing
your all the due Central Sales Tax. Declaration Forms instantly covering
our aforesaid supplies for the quarter ending &LAST_QRTR_END_DT& only
and enable us to furnish the same before our sales tax authority in
